commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=b7e5b5c3e54899f67620c58ebc7bc47f700ea029)
commands.review_summary:
The PR modifies FleetCoordinator hibernated WebSocket restoration to reject ambiguous or stale endpoints, gate fetch/alarm/message handling on restored lease reconciliation, and adds Worker regression tests plus a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction is included. Source inspection shows the stale restored-socket path and the PR adds focused tests, but there is no deployed Cloudflare hibernation proof in the PR discussion.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed because the contributor must supply real hibernation proof and remove the release-owned changelog edit; automation cannot prove their deployed setup.

target.title: fix(coordinator): harden bridge restart recovery
target.body:
## Summary

- restore hibernated coordinator bridge sockets only when their endpoint topology is unambiguous
- fail closed on duplicate, stale, or competing egress, WebVNC, code, and runtime-adapter endpoints
- fence delayed messages and closes by the current live routing-map identity while preserving normal reconnect behavior

## Why

Cloudflare Durable Object hibernation invokes the coordinator constructor again on wake. The coordinator must rebuild safe in-memory routing without disconnecting healthy idle bridges or allowing stale sockets to replace current peers.

This is a focused restart-safety follow-up to #339.

## Verification

- Worker test suite: 604/604
- Worker and Node TypeScript checks
- lint and format checks
- `git diff --check`
- structured autoreview clean with no actionable findings
target.author: steipete-oai
